subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted to the Kingdom of God! The letter written at Easter
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذبه ملکوت الله نامه که در عید ایستر مرقوم نموده بودی رسید از مضمون
subcodes.subjects: @cycles in the physical and spiritual worlds, @charitable associations; humanitarian activities, @consolation and comfort, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @unity; oneness of humanity
